name: windows-exporter-monitoring
description: Install Prometheus windows_exporter (LocalSystem service, TCP 9182) to match mastw host-level metrics export. Optionally repairs missing Windows performance counters first.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\windows-exporter-verify.log'; try { ${r}=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:9182/metrics' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; if (${r}.StatusCode -eq 200 -and ${r}.Content -match '# HELP') { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value ('http 200 bytes=' + ${r}.RawContentLength); Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\windows-exporter-smoke.txt') -Value 'windows_exporter_ok' } else { ('unexpected response status=' + ${r}.StatusCode) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 } } catch { ('exception=' + $_.Exception.Message) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
